action.reasoning: Observation: best remains the 2-epoch full CLIP fine-tune on Sketch (0.1835); longer full fine-tuning overfits and frozen linear probing fails badly, so preserving CLIP while doing limited adaptation is key. Analysis: the current augmentation includes color jitter and horizontal flips, which may be suboptimal for Quickdraw’s black-on-white line drawings; a more target-like augmentation should force grayscale/high-contrast line-style inputs while still allowing small geometric variation. Decision: add a transform mode focused on Quickdraw-style sketch preprocessing/augmentation, train a short 2-epoch CLIP full fine-tune on Sketch with the previously successful LR, and submit evaluation to test whether target-style augmentation improves over the baseline.
